## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and content planning for AI roleplay software.](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to bottom-of-funnel content, specifically competitor comparisons and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Create templated blog posts for head-to-head platform comparisons (e.g., "Exec vs. Second Nature")](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Prioritize direct roleplay competitors for comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [SEO analysis shows stable growth in sessions and engaged sessions, with opportunities in long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

## Topics

### Bottom-of-Funnel Content Strategy

  - [SERP undersaturated for competitor comparisons and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Mixed intent in search results (homepages, blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Opportunity to create blog posts outranking competitors](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Focus on direct AI roleplay competitors rather than broad sales enablement platforms](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Template approach: platform vs. platform, alternatives, and three-platform comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### Content Creation Approach

  - [Create balanced, detailed comparisons of platforms](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Include pricing, G2 opinions, pros/cons for each platform](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Position Exec as best option in non-Exec comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Cons for Exec: not ideal for very small companies (1-2 seats)](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Avoid mentioning competitor-specific features Exec lacks](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)

### SEO Performance and Analysis

  - [Spike in traffic observed, cause unclear (not attributed to event or Google Ads)](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Stable topic performance with growth in sessions and engaged sessions](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Mixed intent issues affecting some roleplay-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Long-tail keywords driving individual signups](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [LLM traffic (ChatGPT, Copilot) showing good engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

### Profound AI Prompts

  - [Plan to focus on sales enablement and training customer-facing prompts](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Aim to increase total prompts to 60-70](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Jo to prepare prompt options for Garett's review](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jo to provide detailed overview of keywords and variations](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Upload keywords to Conan OS for collaborative viewing](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Prepare templates for each keyword type (platform vs. platform, alternatives, three-platform comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Garett to send prioritized list of top 5-10 roleplay competitors](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Garett to review SEO deep dive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Jo to prepare new Profound AI prompt options for review](https://fathom.video/share/rvaSBdShXSeay2Mpm6jywomQa3Z7uM3x?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
